# C++ Chess Bot

Below is a complete C++ chess bot that implements a basic chess engine with move generation, evaluation, and a simple minimax search with alpha-beta pruning. The bot takes a FEN string as input and returns the best move in disambiguated algebraic notation.

```cpp
#include <iostream>
#include <string>
#include <vector>
#include <chrono>
#include <thread>
#include <atomic>
#include <cmath>
#include <algorithm>
#include <cctype>
#include <sstream>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <unordered_set>

using namespace std;
using namespace std::chrono;

// Constants
const int BOARD_SIZE = 8;
const int MAX_DEPTH = 4;
const int INF = 1000000;

// Piece types
enum Piece {
    EMPTY = 0,
    PAWN = 1,
    KNIGHT = 2,
    BISHOP = 3,
    ROOK = 4,
    QUEEN = 5,
    KING = 6
};

// Colors
enum Color {
    WHITE = 0,
    BLACK = 1
};

// Move flags
enum MoveFlag {
    QUIET = 0,
    CAPTURE = 1,
    EN_PASSANT = 2,
    CASTLE_KINGSIDE = 3,
    CASTLE_QUEENSIDE = 4,
    PROMOTION_KNIGHT = 5,
    PROMOTION_BISHOP = 6,
    PROMOTION_ROOK = 7,
    PROMOTION_QUEEN = 8
};

// Structure to represent a move
struct Move {
    int from;
    int to;
    int piece;
    int captured;
    int flag;
    int promotion;
};

// Structure to represent the board
struct Board {
    int squares[BOARD_SIZE][BOARD_SIZE];
    Color turn;
    bool castling[2][2]; // [color][side] (0: kingside, 1: queenside)
    int enPassant;
    int halfmoves;
    int fullmoves;
    int hash;
};

// Global variables
atomic<bool> time_up(false);
Board board;
int nodes = 0;

// Piece values
const int piece_values[] = {0, 100, 300, 300, 500, 900, 10000};

// Bit masks for piece attacks
const int knight_attacks[64] = {
    0x0000000000000042, 0x0000000000000084, 0x0000000000000210, 0x0000000000000420,
    0x0000000000000840, 0x0000000000002100, 0x0000000000004200, 0x0000000000021000,
    0x0000000000042000, 0x0000000000084000, 0x0000000000210000, 0x0000000000420000,
    0x0000000000840000, 0x0000000002100000, 0x0000000004200000, 0x0000000021000000,
    0x0000000042000000, 0x0000000084000000, 0x0000000210000000, 0x0000000420000000,
    0x0000000840000000, 0x0000002100000000, 0x0000004200000000, 0x0000021000000000,
    0x0000042000000000, 0x0000084000000000, 0x0000210000000000, 0x0000420000000000,
    0x0000840000000000, 0x0002100000000000, 0x0004200000000000, 0x0021000000000000,
    0x0042000000000000, 0x0084000000000000, 0x0210000000000000, 0x0420000000000000,
    0x0840000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,

    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
    0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000,
    0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000,
    0x4200000000000000, 0x8400000000000000, 0x2100000000000000, 0x4200000000000000,
